resources.string: Use Same RTP Port for each service(VoIP/VT)
Media type to be negotiated Mandatory
RTP Analyzer : ldb, dra, ciq, ia, hasati, moca, cct, ds
Enable to use Src Profile for Resolution
RTP Loss Rate (Criteria of 1 level Change)
Level of Bitrate to upgrade at once
Reg Unexpected Error Re-Init Max Count
Reg Unexpected Error Re-Init Max Interval
Outgoing International Call ex Home Country

SIP Features - gruu(0x1), rport(0x2), keep(0x4), multiple_reg(0x8), pan_info_in_initial_reg(0x10000), p_preferred_id_in_reg_sub(0x20000), auth_algorithm(0x01000000), ua_set_by_context(0x02000000), user_agent(0x04000000), display_name_dquot(0x08000000), contact_in_all_1xx(0x10000000)
Session timer related headers - none(0x00), session_expires(0x01), minse(0x02), require(0x04,timer in 200 OK), check_session_expires(0x10), all(0xFF)
Comma-separated list - duration/retransmit duration/interval (a num of packets)
0: none, 1: disable checking timestamp (on JitterBuffer), 2: enable checking mark (on VideoDecoder)
Threshold of loss rate to cause TMMBR (1~100)
Total Level of bitrate change (integer : not to much)
Level of bitrate upward at once
Block Features - VoWiFi registration(0x1), VoWiFi setting(0x2), WiFi connection(0x4)
Voice call unavailable due to server connection. Turn phone off and back on again. If this problem happens again, contact customer service.
Use QoS Notify disable after enable
Use FastStop Timer for Wait QoS
LOCAL NUMBER TYPE - POLICY_HOME(0) / POLICY_GEO(0x01) / POLICY_OTHER(0x02)
SRVCC_TYPE - NOTSUPPORTED(0) / NORMAL(0x01) / MIDCALL(0x02) / ALERTING(0x04) / REVERSE(0x08) / BEFOREALERTING(0x10)
CapaMode for re-INVITE w/o SDP - NEGOTIATED_CAPA(1) / FULL_CAPA(2)
Turning off a camera is not supported.
